CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, value VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, 'A'), (2, NULL), (3, 'B'), (4, 'C'), (5, NULL);
SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_OF_NONNULLS_AGG(X) FROM (SELECT X FROM subquery_table WHERE X > 0 ORDER BY X) as subquery;
CREATE TABLE multi_table_1 (id INT, name VARCHAR(100));
CREATE TABLE multi_table_2 (id INT, desc VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO multi_table_2 (id, desc) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 'Description2');
SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_OF_NONNULLS_AGG(t1.name) FROM multi_table_1 t1 JOIN multi_table_2 t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t2.desc IS NOT NULL;
SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_OF_NONNULLS_AGG(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id > 2 ORDER BY id) AS subquery1 UNION SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_OF_NONNULLS_AGG(name) FROM multi_table_1 WHERE id < 3;
SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_OF_NONNULLS_AGG(X) FROM (SELECT X FROM (SELECT id AS X FROM test_table UNION ALL SELECT id FROM multi_table_2 WHERE desc IS NOT NULL) AS inner_query ORDER BY X) AS outer_query;
